events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday, marking another year in the life of the legendary Beatles drummer, who turns 86.

angles.name: Beatles Legacy
angles.copy: Ringo Starr turns 86, we celebrate his incredible career with the Beatles and beyond, playing his biggest hits on Nation 60s and Nation 70s

events.title: Brian May turns 74
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 74th birthday, marking a lifetime of iconic riffs and hits.

angles.name: Queen Icon
angles.copy: Brian May turns 74, we salute the guitar hero with a day of Queen's biggest anthems on Nation Rocks

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday, a testament to his enduring legacy in rock music.

angles.name: Stones Legend
angles.copy: Mick Jagger turns 83, we're rolling out the Stones' greatest hits on Nation 60s and Nation Rocks to celebrate

events.title: MTV Launches
events.blurb: MTV first launched on this day in 1981, revolutionizing music television with its first video, Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV Revolution
angles.copy: On the anniversary of MTV's launch, we look back at how it changed music forever, playing the most iconic 80s videos on Nation 80s

events.title: Oasis Releases Definitely Maybe
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, marking the beginning of the Britpop era.

angles.name: Britpop Legacy
angles.copy: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32, we're revisiting the album that defined a generation on Nation 90s

events.title: Woodstock Festival
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Festival took place on this day in 1969, a pivotal moment in music history.

angles.name: Woodstock Memories
angles.copy: Remembering the legendary Woodstock Festival, 57 years on, with a special playlist on Nation 60s

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis' Death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley passed away on this day in 1977, leaving behind a legacy as the King of Rock and Roll.

angles.name: Elvis Tribute
angles.copy: Paying tribute to the one and only Elvis Presley, 49 years on from his passing, with his greatest hits on Nation 60s and Nation Easy

events.title: Tupac Shakur Shot
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas on this day in 1996, a tragic event that would change the course of hip-hop history.

angles.name: Tupac Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, 30 years on from the tragic event that took his life, with his most powerful tracks on Nation 90s

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix' Death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix passed away on this day in 1970, leaving behind a groundbreaking legacy in rock music.

angles.name: Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Honoring the memory of Jimi Hendrix, 56 years on from his passing, with a special selection of his iconic tracks on Nation 60s and Nation Rocks

events.title: The Beatles Release Abbey Road
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969, a landmark in their discography.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Celebrating 57 years since the release of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road', one of the most influential albums in history, on Nation 60s

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' legendary frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday, marking a lifetime of rock music.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Chrissie Hynde turns 75, we're honoring her legacy with The Pretenders' greatest hits on Nation Rocks

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday, a key figure in the Britpop movement.

angles.name: Oasis Frontman
angles.copy: Liam Gallagher turns 54, we're looking back at his iconic career with Oasis and beyond on Nation 90s

events.title: John Lennon Releases Imagine
events.blurb: John Lennon released his seminal album 'Imagine' on this day in 1971, a powerful statement of peace and humanity.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55, we're celebrating this timeless classic with a special feature on Nation 70s

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon would have celebrated his 86th birthday, a tribute to his enduring legacy as a musician and peace activist.

angles.name: Lennon Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86, with a day of his most iconic songs on Nation 60s and Nation 70s
